subject: fix(map): use proper CameraRef type instead of any
body:
CameraRef isn't re-exported from @rnmapbox/maps package root, so derive
it via React.ComponentRef<typeof Camera> instead of using `any`. This
preserves type safety on the camera ref while avoiding the deep import
path that doesn't resolve.

Tags: fix, typescript, map
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: bulk-import
Semver: patch
